content: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! How can I assist you today?

Ukor Mvendaga is a person with a background in Mathematics and Computer Science. She holds a B.Sc. degree from the University of Agriculture, Makurdi, and is pursuing a Master of Science degree in Computer Science at Joseph Sarwuan Tarka University, Makurdi, expected in 2024. She has also served as a Program Officer at the Inter-Gender Development Center and as a General Manager at Doomex Computer Links. Additionally, Ukor is proficient in English and has skills in various technical areas including Xamarin Forms, Advanced Excel, DHIS, TOMCAT, and OpenHIE-FHIR®.
